pulloutContent.title: Internal Host
pulloutContent.description:
To assist the VIP Host manager with the smooth operation of the internal needs of the clients.


Welcome all clients ensuring a happy, positive and friendly impression of the Beach Club.
Internal Hosts must work closely with the host team to assist seating all clients in a friendly,
professional timely manner and must be knowledgeable and a hub of information with regards
to the venue, food & drink and package menus to maximise sales. The Internal Hosts will be available to clients
needs throughout the day, working closely with other team members and the VIP Host manager
to ensure an excellent service and deal with any client queries or complaints professionally and
efficiently.


You will be expected to take part in daily shows, bottle delivery, modelling and
promotions. The internal Hosts must have an exceptional appearance at all times, be energetic,
fun – loving and have an aptitude for life, comfortable interacting with guests with an aptitude for
sales. Internal Hosts will be happy to spend time with all beach club clients using his/her
knowledge to up sell where possible, entertain and provide an overall exceptional beach club
experience to new and existing clients.

pulloutContent.title: Front of House Host
pulloutContent.description:
To assist the door manager with the smooth operation of the entrance to the beach club. Welcome all clients ensuring a happy, positive and friendly first impression of the Beach Club.

The host will seat all clients in a friendly, professional timely manner and must be knowledgeable and a hub of information with regards to the beach club, holding natural conversation and delivering with the highest of standards. The Host will be available to clients needs throughout the day, working closely with other team members and the door manager to ensure an excellent service and deal with any client queries or complaints professionally and efficiently. The host must have an exceptional appearance at all times, be energetic and comfortable interacting with guests.

The host will be happy to spend time with all beach club clients using his/her knowledge to up sell where possible and provide an overall exceptional beach club experience to new and existing clients.

pulloutContent.title: Bartender
pulloutContent.description:
Welcome all clients to our bars ensuring a happy, positive and friendly impression of the Beach Club. The bar tenders will assist the Head Bartender to ensure the highest quality of service and quality beverages according to set standards and recipes and always striving to minimize wastage.

This will be executed in a friendly, professional and timely manner holding natural conversation and delivering with the highest of standards and best practice. The server must be knowledgeable and have a perfect understanding with regards to all our products and menus. You are expected to be attentive and responsive and available to clients needs throughout the day, your area perfectly attended ensuring cleanliness and working professionally with other team members.

It is your responsibility to ensure that the clients receive the best possible experience and that all client queries and complaints are dealt with professionally and efficiently. The bartender must always have an exceptional appearance, be energetic and comfortable interacting with clients. The bartender will be comfortable using his/her knowledge to up sell where possible and provide an overall exceptional beach club experience to new and existing clients.

pulloutContent.title: Bar Support
pulloutContent.description:
Barbacks are an essential part of the service team within the Beach Club. The Barbacks are
required to work closely and assist the bar team. The barback must be knowledgeable and
have a perfect understanding with regards to all our beverage products. You are required and
not limited to maintaining a clean, well-stocked and inviting bar area. You are expected to be
attentive and responsive and available throughout the day, your area perfectly attended
ensuring cleanliness and working professionally and closely with the bar staff.

pulloutContent.title: Shots (Beverage Sales)
pulloutContent.description:
To up sell a variety of alcoholic beverages and products to the clients within the beach club in a
happy, fun, positive and friendly manner, the main responsibility is to promote and sell products
to maximize sales. Shot Girls must be knowledgeable and a hub of information with regards to
the beach club working closely with the hosts and floor staff to ensure client’s needs are met
throughout their visit. The Shot Girls must always have an exceptional appearance be
energetic, fun – loving and have an aptitude for life, comfortable interacting with guests with an
aptitude for sales. Shot Girls will be happy to spend time with all beach club clients, entertain,
sell and drink responsibly whilst being professional at all times and provide an overall
exceptional beach club experience to new and existing clients.

pulloutContent.title: Food Runner
pulloutContent.description:
Food runners are an essential part of the service team within the Beach Club. The food runners
are required to work closely with the waiters/waitress and kitchen team to deliver food in a
friendly, professional and timely manner to the beds/tables. The runner must be knowledgeable
and have a perfect understanding with regards to all our products leaving the kitchen. You are
required and not limited to maintaining a clean, well-stocked and inviting floor area. You are
expected to be attentive and responsive and available throughout the day, your area perfectly
attended ensuring cleanliness and working professionally and closely with the waiting staff.

pulloutContent.title: Waiting Staff
pulloutContent.description:
Welcome all clients ensuring a happy, positive and friendly impression of the Beach Club. The
waiter/waitress will serve food and beverages to our clients in a friendly, professional and timely
manner to the beds/tables they have been assigned (but not limited too) holding natural
conversation and delivering with the highest of standards and best practice. The server must
be knowledgeable and have a perfect understanding with regards to all our products and
menus. You are expected to be attentive and responsive and available to clients needs
throughout the day, your area perfectly attended ensuring cleanliness and working
professionally and closely with the runners. It is your responsibility to ensure that the clients
receive the best possible experience and that all client queries and complaints are dealt with
professionally and efficiently. The waiter/waitress must always have an exceptional appearance,
be energetic and comfortable interacting with clients. The waiter/waitress will be comfortable
using his/her knowledge to up sell where possible and provide an overall exceptional beach
club experience to new and existing clients.
